name: scientific-figure-team
description: Python-first scientific figure team plugin for raw-data-gated MOF plotting, method-search-backed preprocessing, plan-confirmed figure generation, Chinese-commented code, Arial-first single-font plotting, gradient fills, QA, final rendered-image audit, and readability gates with subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Raw-data-gated MOF and scientific figure workflow.
interface.longDescription: A cross-platform research figure plugin that requires raw data for quantitative figures, searches literature or accepted processing methods before preprocessing, creates English pre-plot plans for confirmation, generates Python plotting code with Chinese inline explanations, uses Arial-first single-font typography, prefers subtle gradient fills, and runs publication figure QA.
defaultPrompt: Turn my data into a publication-ready figure.
Convert this mechanism text into a figure plan.
Audit this Python figure code and outputs.
